description: You are an FM Information Manager preparing the FZK-Haus residential building IFC model for handover to the client's operations team. Review the maintenance specification document on the workstation to understand the required MEP plant equipment and maintenance workflows. Model a boiler (IfcBoiler) and a pump (IfcPump) on the ground floor. Create the specified maintenance schedule and tasks, assigning each piece of equipment to its respective task to establish the process-to-product relationship. Save the FM-ready model to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_fm_maintenance.ifc.
